name: Pro Medicus Limited
analysis: PME has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 48% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$167.7800. Trade idea: entry A$172.9300, stop A$158.6178, target A$194.3136 (1.49:1) — then trail it.
